mechanism: The 50-75bp divergence between equity-implied and actual HY spreads is a concrete, tradeable expression of the broader cross-asset inconsistency. Equity markets capitalize long-duration fiscal risk differently than credit markets anchored by near-term default/carry dynamics.
regime_dependence: Signal is most meaningful when divergence exceeds the 20-30bp historical average (2021-23). Three of four historical episodes resolved via credit widening.
